creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maintainer of irc/scrollz,
 
 Please note that PR ports/176786 has just been submitted.
 
 If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 and a committer will take care of it.
 
 The full text of the PR can be found at:
 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/176786
 --

 Beech Rintoul - Committer / Developer - beech@FreeBSD.org
